name: Money Run Fest
description: Are you looking for a fun run race 3D game to relieve stress? What do you think about the game with the money theme? Money Run Fest 3D is inspired by the reality of monetizing. The path in this free game simulates the road to the success of a millionaire or billionaire. This game is definitely one of the best money race 3D games that you cannot miss. Your mission is to monetize, study and work to become rich. Pay attention to stay away and overcome obstacles. These things can make you go bankrupt. Saving your money!!
instructions: Mouse Left click and hold to play
